data.title: Law firm KSF investigates sale of Diamond Hill Investment Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: DHIL) to First Eagle Investments.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, a leading law firm, Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, along with former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., announced an investigation into the potential acquisition of Diamond Hill Investment Group, Inc. (NasdaqGS: DHIL) by First Eagle Investments. The investigation is centered on determining whether the sale is in the best interest of DHIL shareholders and evaluating any potential discrepancies.

data.title: Investigation into Destination XL Group, Inc. merger by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC announced on Jan 23, 2026. DXLG involved in merger with FBB Holdings I, Inc.
data.description: A recent announcement on Jan. 23, 2026, revealed that the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, along with former Attorney General of Louisiana Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., is conducting an investigation into the planned merger between Destination XL Group, Inc. (NasdaqGM: DXLG) and FBB Holdings I, Inc. This investigation was launched following the news of the merger, which is currently pending closure.

data.title: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC investigating sale of United Security Bancshares to Community West Bancshares (NasdaqGS: UBFO).
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana, along with the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, announced an investigation into the planned acquisition of United Security Bancshares (traded on NasdaqGS as UBFO) by Community West Bancshares. The investigation aims to assess the terms of the proposed sale and ensure transparency for shareholders. The potential transaction has garnered significant attention due to its impact on the financial market and United Security Bancshares' future. Detailed analysis and evaluation of the deal will be conducted to safeguard the interests of all parties involved.

data.title: Investigation launched on sale of Heritage Commerce Corp to CVB Financial Corp by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC.
data.description: An investigation is being conducted by Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC regarding the potential acquisition of Heritage Commerce Corp (NasdaqGS: HTBK) by CVB Financial Corp. (NasdaqGS: CVBF). Former Attorney General of Louisiana, Foti, and KSF are examining the details of the proposed sale that involves these two companies listed on NasdaqGS.

data.title: Investors alerted as Kahn Swick & Foti investigates Udemy sale to Coursera, Inc. (NasdaqGS: UDMY to NYSE: COUR).
data.description: On January 23, 2026, an investigation into the potential acquisition of Udemy, Inc. (NasdaqGS: UDMY) by Coursera, Inc. (NYSE: COUR) was announced by former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC ("KSF"). The details of the proposed sale are currently being examined by the team.

data.title: GemFair & De Beers London launch jewelry collection with ethically sourced artisanal diamonds for the first time. Story highlighted to consumers.
data.description: De Beers Group has recently announced a partnership with GemFair in London on January 23, 2026. This collaboration introduces GemFair's ethically sourced, artisanal-mined diamonds in jewelry for the first time. This move aims to raise awareness among consumers regarding GemFair's commitment to supporting livelihoods. It marks a significant milestone for GemFair and De Beers Group as they work together to promote sustainable practices in the industry. This initiative showcases GemFair's dedication to ethical sourcing and highlights the positive impact on the community.

data.title: Charlotte's Web praises Rep. Griffith for introducing HEMP Act, ensuring FDA oversight and consumer safety for CBD products.
data.description: The HEMP Act has been introduced to implement FDA supervision, manufacturing regulations, and safety standards for consumers. The Act aims to uphold the legality of CBD products that meet compliance standards. Charlotte's Web Holdings, Inc., a prominent company in the industry, recently announced this development on Jan. 23, 2026. The company is listed on the TSX as CWEB and on the OTC as CWBHF.

data.title: Domestic Metals hires ICP Securities for market making and clarifies Michael Pound's connection to the company in news release on Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 23, 2026, it was announced that there was a correction made in the third paragraph regarding the engagement of Michael Pound. The correction clarified that Mr. Pound is no longer independent of the company.

data.title: Leishen Energy received a Nasdaq notice for not holding an annual meeting in time, violating Nasdaq Listing Rule 5620(a).
data.description: Beijing-based Leishen Energy Holding Co., Ltd. revealed today that it has been notified by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC of its non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5620(a) for failing to conduct an annual meeting of shareholders within a year after the end of its fiscal year. Leishen Energy is a prominent provider of clean-energy equipment and integrated solutions for the oil and gas sector. The notice was received on January 16, 2026, indicating the breach of the listing rule.

data.title: Global investment casting market to reach USD 32.3 billion by 2035 from USD 19.1 billion in 2025, with 5.4% CAGR.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, as of January 23, 2026, reports indicate a significant projection for the global investment casting market. Surpassing USD 19.1 billion in 2025, this market is anticipated to soar to nearly USD 32.3 billion by 2035, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.4% throughout the forecast period. With this growth, the market is poised to witness an absolute increase of USD 13.2 billion in value.

data.title: Ann Arbor entrepreneurs Matt and Shelley Crawford launching Pilates Addiction studio with WundaFormer classes, opening early spring.
data.description: Coming soon to Ann Arbor, Michigan, is a new Pilates studio brought to the community by spouses Matt and Shelley Crawford. The entrepreneurial duo will bring high-energy, results-oriented Pilates sessions, featuring WundaFormer classes. The studio is set to open its doors on January 23, 2026. This dynamic Pilates experience will offer the community a fresh approach to fitness, catering to those seeking transformative workouts. Stay tuned as the duo prepares to launch their unique Pilates venture in the bustling city.

data.title: Investors who lost money from CRWV should contact Robbins LLP about their rights. Class action filed for those who acquired CoreWeave securities between March 28, 2025, and December 15, 2025.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, in San Diego, Robbins LLP issued a reminder to stockholders regarding a class action lawsuit filed for investors who bought or acquired CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV) securities between March 28, 2025, and December 15, 2025. CoreWeave claims to be an...

data.title: Investigation into ON24, Inc. sale to Cvent by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC due to adequacy of price and process. (Numbers N/A)
data.description: A probe is being conducted regarding the planned acquisition of ON24, Inc. (NYSE: ONTF) by Cvent, as announced in New York and New Orleans on January 23, 2026. The investigation is led by former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., along with the legal firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC. The terms of the proposed sale are being scrutinized, with a focus on ensuring fairness and transparency throughout the process.

data.title: Urgent call for international protection for Bobi Wine after threats from President Museveni's son Muhoozi Kainerugaba.
data.description: Amsterdam & Partners LLP, a longstanding international legal counsel for Ugandan opposition figure Bobi Wine, has issued a concerning alert about the public warnings directed at Mr. Wine by General Muhoozi Kainerugaba. The latter, who is the son of Ugandan President Yoweri Museveni and holds a senior position in the country's security organization, recently made threats against Mr. Wine following the January 15th election in Uganda. These statements are deemed as a serious and plausible risk to Mr. Wine's safety and well-being.

data.title: Japan's tremors prompt US Treasury to consider currency intervention. New York Fed inquiries hint at potential large yen purchase.
data.description: The New York Federal Reserve's recent inquiries regarding the expenses involved in swapping yen for dollars have indicated to traders that there is a possibility of the U.S. government engaging in a significant acquisition of the Japanese currency. This development has caught the attention of market participants and sparked speculation about potential upcoming transactions involving considerable amounts of yen and dollars.

data.title: Colombian National Tax and Customs Authority notifies Ecopetrol of Resolution 000571 related to VAT proceedings on fuel imports.
data.description: Colombia's leading petroleum company, Ecopetrol S.A., disclosed receiving Resolution 000571 from the Colombian National Tax and Customs Authority ("DIAN") on January 22, 2026. The resolution's details were announced by the Company the following day. Ecopetrol, listed on the Colombian stock exchange as ECOPETROL and on the New York Stock Exchange as EC, confirmed the tax-related development.

data.title: Alert for BBWI stockholders: Class action against Bath & Body Works, Inc. filed for losses between June 4, 2024 and November 19, 2025. Contact Robbins LLP for rights info.
data.description: In San Diego, a legal firm, Robbins LLP, issues a reminder about a class action lawsuit for investors who bought or acquired Bath & Body Works, Inc. (NYSE: BBWI) stocks between June 4, 2024, and November 19, 2025. The lawsuit covers all individuals involved during this period and concerns potential securities law violations. Bath & Body Works is a prominent company in the industry.

data.title: Investor alert for Two Harbors Investment Corp. as Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC investigate sale to UWM Holdings Corporation.
data.description: Investigations are being carried out by Former Attorney General of Louisiana Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC regarding the potential sale of Two Harbors Investment Corp. (NYSE: TWO) to UWM Holdings Corporation (NYSE:...). The inquiry is focused on determining whether the sale is advantageous for shareholders. Specific details about the transaction and the companies involved have not been disclosed in the provided information.

data.title: Investors who suffered losses in ARDT stock should contact Robbins LLP regarding a class action for those who purchased ARDT securities between July 18, 2025, and November 12, 2025.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Robbins LLP issued a reminder to shareholders regarding a class action lawsuit filed for individuals who bought or acquired Ardent Health, Inc. (NYSE: ARDT) stocks between July 18, 2025, and November 12, 2025. The lawsuit involves allegations against Ardent Health and its associated companies.

data.title: Investigation launched by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC on sale of DigitalBridge Group, Inc. (NYSE: DBRG) to SoftBank Group Corp.
data.description: Investigation into the potential acquisition of DigitalBridge Group, Inc. (NYSE: DBRG) by SoftBank Group Corp is underway by former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC. The acquisition proposal is being scrutinized for its terms and implications. The news was reported on Jan. 23, 2026, in New York and New Orleans. Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and the firm are focusing on assessing the deal's details, considering the significant impact it could have on various stakeholders.
